layman_headline: Crypto market is fearful and alts are bleeding — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' state with Bitcoin dominating at 56.2%, which means money is flowing away from smaller coins into Bitcoin. Almost every altcoin candidate is in a downtrend with bearish chart structures. While a few coins like ZRO are approaching oversold territory, none of them have a clear enough catalyst or technical setup to justify risking capital today.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines and keep your cash ready. Wait for the market fear to stabilize and for a clear bounce signal — like an RSI dipping below 30 with a volume spike — before entering any trade.
expert_reasoning: No candidate presents a high-conviction swing setup. ZRO's RSI at 31 is the most compelling technical signal, but the chart bias is -0.70 (bearish), price is below all major MAs, and there's no MACD bullish cross or volume breakout — both of which have 100% historical win rates in our signal credibility data. The Fear & Greed index at 26 is improving but still firmly in Fear territory, and BTC dominance at 56.2% continues to suppress alt performance. The macro backdrop — Iran strikes, stablecoin market cap shrinking by $10B — adds headwinds. Disciplined swing trading means waiting for setups where multiple reliable signals converge, not forcing entries in hostile conditions.
risk_factors: BTC dominance continues rising, further crushing altcoin valuations
Macro geopolitical uncertainty (Iran strikes) could trigger a broader risk-off move
Stablecoin market cap decline signals capital leaving the crypto ecosystem entirely
watch_list: ZRO RSI dropping below 30 with a volume spike — would signal genuine capitulation and bounce setup
BTC price action around $64K support — a breakdown could drag all alts down further
Fear & Greed index trajectory — needs to reach 20 or below for maximum contrarian opportunity, or cross above 30 for sentiment shift
market_context: The crypto market is in a cautious Fear state (26/100) with BTC flat near $64K and high dominance at 56.2%. Altcoins are broadly weak with bearish chart structures across the board, and macro uncertainty from geopolitical events is keeping risk appetite suppressed.
context_banner: High BTC dominance and persistent fear are crushing altcoin setups — discipline demands patience until reliable signals align.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear) with improving trend — historically 80% reliable, but not yet at extreme levels that trigger strong contrarian bounces.
ZRO RSI at 31 is the lowest among candidates and approaching oversold, but needs confirmation from volume or MACD cross — RSI alone has 75% win rate but best when combined.
Bitcoin nearing Fidelity's power law support line and BIP-110 fork debate create uncertainty; stablecoin market cap shrinking $10B signals capital outflow from crypto.
No specific altcoin-positive catalysts; Strategy/Saylor narrative and BIP-110 debate dominate headlines, keeping attention on BTC rather than alts.
ETH derivatives reset and DePIN/gaming rebound narrative noted, but no immediate catalyst strong enough to override bearish alt market structure.
